headline: SBA Communications Weighs Sale As Valuation Standoff Tests Tower Thesis
summary: SBA Communications (NasdaqGS: SBAC) is reviewing options for its future, including a potential sale of the company. The review follows preliminary takeover interest from potential buyers. Discussions have paused as parties disagree on valuation terms. The outcome could affect the company’s ownership structure and long-term direction. SBA Communications operates cell towers and related infrastructure that support wireless carriers and data transmission. For investors following tower...
